title: Create++
description: A (not quite)small modpack, themed around automation and adventure!
body:
## Hello and welcome to Create++, with its factories, magic, and (hopefully) fun!

This is a passion project for me, for which I've been working on for a while now. It's not much, but it's honest work. While I did begin developing it for me and my friends(shoutout to you guys, y'all the best), I had so much fun playing around with it that I decided to release it publicly. And yes, now it's easier to download. You're welcome, guys.
Have fun exploring!


### New Stuff:
Presenting Create++ 1.2.3!
Updated more mods, some of them again, and removed some. See the changelog for specifics. Also, added a bunch of concrete-related recipes(and lost my sanity). Have fun!


Until we meet again!

P.S.- I have not properly tested directly uploading this modpack to a server hosting platform, instead using e4mc to host multiplayer and playing on that. I recommend that this is done. If you wish to go ahead, be careful! Here be dragons!
